1.textAm: በመጀመሪያ መግባር በሆነ ጊዜ መጉሥጠር በዓለም ነበረ። አየርም እና ምድር አድርጎ ።
1.textEn: In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.

1.textAm: ዓለምም ባዶ እና ባለፈ ነበረ። ጨለማም በጨለማ ላይ ተደረገ።
1.textEn: And the earth was without form, and void; and darkness was upon the face of the deep.

1.textAm: መጉሥጠርም በቃሉ ብርሃን እንደሆነ አለ። ብርሃንም ተፈጠረ።
1.textEn: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.

2.textEn: Thus the heavens and the earth were finished.
